title: phacelia dubia var. dubia
intro: Phacelia dubia var. dubia, also known as Phacelia, is a perennial herb belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, and is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Its health benefits include soothing digestive problems, such as indigestion and irritable bowel syndrome, as well as potentially reducing stress and anxiety. Phacelia dubia var. dubia can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a versatile herb for various herbal preparations.
